---
#title: "Quantitative Methoden für die Gesundheitswissenschaften"
jupyter: python3
author:   
  - name: Ignacio Leiva
    #orcid: 0000-0003-1689-0557
    email: ignacio.leiva@uni-muenster.de
  - name: Aiswarya Puzhakkara Chennas
    #orcid: 0000-0003-1689-0557
    email: aiswarya.chennas@uni-muenster.de
---

{{< qrcode https://vfz-munster.github.io/wissenschafts_practicals/ >}}


::: {.content-visible when-profile="english"}
::: {.hero-section}
# Welcome to the Practical Course
Explore, analyze, and learn with NHANES data.
:::

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .feature-card}
### 📊 Data Analysis
We will use data from the [NHANES](https://wwwn.cdc.gov/nchs/nhanes/) (1999–2003) to describe the health status of the U.S. population (ages 30-85).
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .feature-card}
### 📁 The Dataset
The data is stored in `nhanes30.sav`. This file contains observed data, variable descriptions, and metadata.
:::
:::
<br>
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="german"}
::: {.hero-section}
# Willkommen zum Praktikum
Entdecken, analysieren und lernen Sie mit NHANES-Daten.
:::

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .feature-card}
### 📊 Datenanalyse
Wir verwenden Daten der [NHANES](https://wwwn.cdc.gov/nchs/nhanes/) (1999–2003), um den Gesundheitszustand der US-Bevölkerung (30-85 Jahre) zu beschreiben.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .feature-card}
### 📁 Der Datensatz
Die Daten sind in `nhanes30.sav` gespeichert. Diese Datei enthält Beobachtungsdaten, Variablenbeschreibungen und Metadaten.
:::
:::
<br>
:::



::: {.callout-tip}
## .sav?

::: {.content-visible when-profile="english"}
`.sav` extension indicates an SPSS file, which contains the observed data, variable descriptions, and metadata.
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="german"}
Die Erweiterung `.sav` kennzeichnet eine SPSS-Datei, die die beobachteten Daten, Variablenbeschreibungen und Metadaten enthält.
:::
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="english"}

<br> 

### Variable description


```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd
import itables 
import itables.options as opt
opt.warn_on_undocumented_option = False
itables.options.columnDefs = [{"className": "dt-left", "targets": "_all"}]


data_dict = pd.DataFrame({
    "Variable name": [
        "SEQN", "nteeth", "cal_mean", "perio", "perio2", "bop", "male", "age",
        "edu", "smk", "smk2", "alcg", "Height", "Weight", "bmi", "bmi_cat",
        "wc", "wc_cat", "diab", "mortstat", "perm_exm"
    ],
    "Description": [
        "Participant ID",
        "Number of natural teeth",
        "Mean clinical attachment loss",
        "Periodontitis (CDC–AAP definition, Eke et al. 2012)",
        "Periodontitis",
        "Bleeding on probing (World Definition, Tonetti et al. 2018)",
        "Sex",
        "Age",
        "Education level",
        "Smoking status",
        "Smoking status (collapsed)",
        "Alcohol consumption",
        "Height",
        "Weight",
        "Body Mass Index",
        "BMI categories",
        "Waist circumference",
        "Waist circumference categories",
        "Diabetes",
        "Mortality status",
        "Number of person-months between examination and death/censoring"
    ],
    "Values": [
        "",                  # SEQN
        "0–32",              # nteeth
        "mm",                # cal_mean
        "1=None, 2=Mild, 3=Moderate, 4=Severe",  # perio
        "1=Yes, 2=No",       # perio2
        "1=None, 2=>10%, 3=≥10%",  # bop
        "1=Female, 2=Male",  # male
        "Years",             # age
        "1=<9th grade/missing, 2=9–11 grade/high school, 3=≥some college",  # edu
        "1=Never, 2=Former, 3=Current",  # smk
        "1=Never, 2=Former/Current",     # smk2
        "Grams per day",     # alcg
        "cm",                # Height
        "kg",                # Weight
        "kg/m²",             # bmi
        "1=<18.5, 2=18.5–25, 3=25–30, 4=≥30",  # bmi_cat
        "cm",                # wc
        "1=M:<102,F:<88; 2=M:≥102,F:≥88",     # wc_cat
        "Yes, No",           # diab
        "1=Alive, 0=Deceased",  # mortstat
        ""                   # perm_exm
    ]
})

# Show the table

itables.show(
    data_dict,
    dom="Brtip",
    classes="display nowrap compact",
    style="table-layout:auto;width:50%;float:left",
    columnControl=["order", ["orderAsc", "orderDesc", "search"]],
    ordering={"indicators": False, "handler": False},
    buttons=["columnsToggle", {"extend": "csv", "text": "🔗 Download data description"}],
    paging=False,       # no pagination
   # scrollY=None,       # disable scrolling limit
    scrollCollapse=False
)

```

:::{.hidden}
| **Variable name** | **Description** | **Values** |
|:------------------|:--------------|:-----------------|
| SEQN | Participant ID |  |
| nteeth | Number of natural teeth | 0–32 |
| cal_mean | Mean clinical attachment loss | mm |
| perio | Periodontitis (CDC–AAP definition, Eke et al. 2012) | 1=None, 2=Mild, 3=Moderate, 4=Severe |
| perio2 | Periodontitis | 1=Yes, 2=No |
| bop | Bleeding on probing (World Definition, Tonetti et al. 2018) | 1=None, 2=>10%, 3= $\geq$ 10% |
| male | Sex | 1=Female, 2=Male |
| age | Age | Years |
| edu | Education level | 1=<9th grade/missing, 2=9–11 grade/high school, 3=$\geq$ some college |
| smk | Smoking status | 1=Never, 2=Former, 3=Current |
| smk2 | Smoking status | 1=Never, 2=Former/Current |
| alcg | Alcohol consumption | Grams per day |
| Height | Height | cm |
| Weight | Weight | kg |
| bmi | Body Mass Index | kg/m² |
| bmi_cat | BMI categories | 1= $<$ 18.5, 2=18.5–25, 3=25–30, 4= $\geq$ 30 |
| wc | Waist circumference | cm |
| wc_cat | Waist circumference categories | 1=M: $<$ 102, F: $<$ 88; 2=M: $\geq$ 102, F: $\geq$ 88 |
| diab | Diabetes | Yes, No |
| mortstat | Mortality status | 1=Alive, 0=Deceased |
| perm_exm | Number of person-months between examination and death/censoring |  |
:::
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="german"}
### Datensatzbeschreibung

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd
import itables 
import itables.options as opt
opt.warn_on_undocumented_option = False
itables.options.columnDefs = [{"className": "dt-left", "targets": "_all"}]

daten_dict = pd.DataFrame({
    "Variablenname": [
        "SEQN", "nteeth", "cal_mean", "perio", "perio2", "bop", "male", "age",
        "edu", "smk", "smk2", "alcg", "Height", "Weight", "bmi", "bmi_cat",
        "wc", "wc_cat", "diab", "mortstat", "perm_exm"
    ],
    "Bedeutung": [
        "Probandennummer",
        "Anzahl der natürlichen Zähne",
        "Mittlerer Attachmentverlust",
        "Parodontitis (CDC–AAP Definition, Eke et al. 2012)",
        "Parodontitis",
        "Bleeding on probe (World Definition, Tonetti et al. 2018)",
        "Geschlecht",
        "Alter",
        "Bildungsniveau",
        "Rauchstatus",
        "Rauchstatus (zusammengefasst)",
        "Alkoholkonsum",
        "Körpergröße",
        "Körpergewicht",
        "Body Mass Index",
        "BMI-Kategorien",
        "Taillenumfang",
        "Taillenumfang – Kategorien",
        "Diabetes",
        "Mortalität",
        "Anzahl der Personenmonate zwischen Untersuchung und Versterben/Zensierung"
    ],
    "Ausprägungen": [
        "",                   # SEQN
        "0–32",               # nteeth
        "mm",                 # cal_mean
        "1=None, 2=mild, 3=moderate, 4=severe",  # perio
        "1=Ja, 2=Nein",       # perio2
        "1=None, 2=>10%, 3=≥10%",  # bop
        "1=Female, 2=Male",   # male
        "Jahre",              # age
        "1=<9th grade/missing, 2=9–11 grade/high school, 3=≥some college",  # edu
        "1=Never, 2=Former, 3=Current",  # smk
        "1=Never, 2=Former/Current",     # smk2
        "Gramm pro Tag",      # alcg
        "cm",                 # Height
        "kg",                 # Weight
        "kg/m²",              # bmi
        "1=<18.5, 2=18.5–25, 3=25–30, 4=≥30",  # bmi_cat
        "cm",                 # wc
        "1=m:<102,f:<88; 2=m:≥102,f:≥88",      # wc_cat
        "Ja, Nein",           # diab
        "1=lebend, 0=verstorben",  # mortstat
        ""                    # perm_exm
    ]
})

# Show the table

itables.show(
    daten_dict,
    dom="Brtip",
    classes="display nowrap compact",
    style="table-layout:auto;width:50%;float:left",
    columnControl=["order", ["orderAsc", "orderDesc", "search"]],
    ordering={"indicators": False, "handler": False},
    buttons=["columnsToggle", {"extend": "csv", "text": "🔗 Download data description"}],
    paging=False,       # no pagination
   # scrollY=None,       # disable scrolling limit
    scrollCollapse=False
)

```

:::{.hidden}
| **Variablenname** | **Bedeutung** | **Ausprägungen** |
|:------------------|:--------------|:-----------------|
| SEQN | Probandennummer |  |
| nteeth | Anzahl der natürlichen Zähne | 0–32 |
| cal_mean | Mittlerer Attachmentverlust | mm |
| perio | Parodontitis (CDC-AAP Definition Eke et al. 2012) | 1=None, 2=mild, 3=moderate, 4=severe |
| perio2 | Parodontitis | 1=Ja, 2=Nein |
| bop | Bleeding on probe (World Definition, Tonetti et al. 2018) | 1=None, 2=>10%, 3= $\geq$ 10% |
| male | Geschlecht | 1=Female, 2=Male |
| age | Jahre | Jahre |
| edu | Bildungsniveau | 1=<9th grade/missing, 2=9–11 grade/high school, 3=≥some college |
| smk | Rauchstatus | 1=Never, 2=Former, 3=Current |
| smk2 | Rauchstatus | 1=Never, 2=Former/Current |
| alcg | Alkoholkonsum | Gramm pro Tag |
| Height | Körpergröße | cm |
| Weight | Körpergewicht | kg |
| bmi | Body Mass Index | kg/m² |
| bmi_cat | BMI-Kategorien | 1= $<$ 18.5, 2=18.5–25, 3=25–30, 4= $\geq$ 30 |
| wc | Taillenumfang | cm |
| wc_cat | Taillenumfang – Kategorien | 1=m:$<$ 102,f: $<$ 88; 2=m:$\geq$ 102,f: $\geq$ 88 |
| diab | Diabetes | Ja, Nein |
| mortstat | Mortalität | 1=lebend, 0=verstorben |
| perm_exm | Anzahl der Personenmonate zwischen Untersuchung und Versterben/Zensierung |  |
:::
:::
